subcodes.first_line: The Truth hath indeed come, while the people remain veiled by a manifest veil. The Promise hath appeared, yet mankind wandereth in strange delusion. The horizon of knowledge hath dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الحق و القوم فی حجاب مبین قد ظهر الوعد و الناس فی وهم عجیب قد لاح افق العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
